claimText: CityUHK has an official guideline index for the use of generative AI tools in teaching and learning, effective from Semester A 2025/26, with separate staff and student guideline links.

citation.citationTitle: Guidelines on the Use of Generative AI Tools in Teaching and Learning | City University of Hong Kong
citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.
